creator: ade@FreeBSD.org
text:
On Thu, Oct 19, 2000 at 05:53:09AM -0500, ishmael27@home.com wrote:
> >Synopsis:       New port: imlib2-1.0.0

Whoever commits this, please ask for a repo-copy from graphics/imlib
first, so we can preserve history.

Note that this won't be used by GNOME in any way -- the move to
gdk-pixbuf (byebye, imlib) is progressing each day.

Thanks,
	-aDe

-- 
Ade Lovett, Austin, TX.			ade@FreeBSD.org
FreeBSD: The Power to Serve		http://www.FreeBSD.org/
